title: hieracium haematopodum subsp. nigratum
intro: Hieracium haematopodum subsp. nigratum, also known as the black hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium haematopodum subsp. nigratum lie in its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce blood pressure, alleviate joint pain and swelling, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium haematopodum subsp. nigratum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
